workload: RBX1 seal(41B)+open round-trip, AES-256-GCM, via librobobus C-ABI
note: One C-ABI shared library (librobobus) exposes robobus's full seal/open surface to any language through its own FFI. The round-trip is dominated by AES-256-GCM in the shared C, so every binding lands near the C ceiling — the FFI overhead is nearly free. Each binding is verified to round-trip (open(seal(pt))==pt) before timing.

bindings.note: cffi ABI-mode dlopen (reference; also in Python runtime matrix)
